summary: Herald replaces Watchman (never coded) + Transponder (exists) as unified event bus for Core.

content.decision: Create Herald as unified event bus absorbing Watchman (event observation) and Transponder (telemetry emission) into a single Core component.
content.context: Watchman was conceptual — never implemented in code. Transponder exists as cli/internal/transponder/ (~200 lines). With v0.11 continuous capture via hooks, Watchman's 'decide when to capture' role dissolves into hook registration (adapter) + event emission (Transponder). Merging avoids creating a component that immediately has no unique job.
content.naming: Herald chosen following the household-role naming pattern from brand guidelines. A herald observes court events, announces them, and records them — maps to observe + emit + record. Replaces Transponder (a device name that broke the role pattern).
impact: Glossary, brand source-of-truth, and 9 architecture docs updated
Watchman removed from glossary entirely (never coded)
Capture Engine redefined: Herald + Drafter + Wrap-up
